---
title: "complete_standard_calendar"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/utils-misc.R#L447)

# `complete_standard_calendar()`

Title

## Usage

```r
complete_standard_calendar(.data, x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `.data` | DBI object |
| `x` | ti object |

## Value

DBI object
